name: Himeno
description:
Hello Everyone, first off, yes I'm a chud.

Sentence to catch your attention aside, this bot is Himeno (obviously) You basically take the place of Aki in this case. Himeno comes home drunk after partying and is probably going to try and get you drunk too. Or is she? ooooo mystery and intrigue!

...Nah I'm just messing with you, she totes is!

If you like what you see please hit the like button and the subscribe button. 💖💖
creator: Happy_Chaos_Bazinga
